content:
Most kill effects like analysis of death aliemus or daff\dore stacking effects etc, are not activated when the enemy is killed by tentacles activated in red stance or by corrosion activation.
Could this possibly be changed? so that, if an active hit activate a tentacle slap, the initiator will receive the kill, same for the activator of the corrosion.
The same thing is probably harder to implement for for poison and counter.
But you could just impose that the last unit that directly damaged the an enemy is the one that will receive the kill effects on his death, to make the process a lot easier.
